mapper.select: SELECT hotel_id AS hotelId, hotel_name AS hotelName FROM tbl_hotel WHERE active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY hotel_id
SELECT place_code AS placeCode, place_name AS placeName, active_yn AS activeYn FROM tbl_shuttle_place WHERE active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY place_name

SELECT r.route_id AS routeId, r.fk_hotel_id AS fkHotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.route_type AS routeType, r.start_place_code AS startPlaceCode, sp.place_name AS startPlaceName, r.end_place_code AS endPlaceCode, ep.place_name AS endPlaceName, r.route_name AS routeName, r.active_yn AS activeYn FROM tbl_shuttle_route r JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = r.fk_hotel_id JOIN tbl_shuttle_place sp ON sp.place_code = r.start_place_code JOIN tbl_shuttle_place ep ON ep.place_code = r.end_place_code WHERE r.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ORDER BY r.route_type, r.route_id

SELECT t.timetable_id AS timetableId, t.fk_route_id AS fkRouteId, r.fk_hotel_id AS fkHotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.route_type AS routeType, r.route_name AS routeName, r.start_place_code AS startPlaceCode, sp.place_name AS startPlaceName, r.end_place_code AS endPlaceCode, ep.place_name AS endPlaceName, t.depart_time AS departTime, t.capacity AS capacity, t.active_yn AS activeYn FROM tbl_shuttle_timetable t JOIN tbl_shuttle_route r ON r.route_id = t.fk_route_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = r.fk_hotel_id JOIN tbl_shuttle_place sp ON sp.place_code = r.start_place_code JOIN tbl_shuttle_place ep ON ep.place_code = r.end_place_code WHERE r.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ORDER BY r.route_type, r.route_id, t.depart_time

SELECT b.shuttle_block_id AS shuttleBlockId, b.fk_hotel_id AS fkHotelId, b.fk_route_id AS fkRouteId, b.fk_timetable_id AS fkTimetableId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.route_type AS routeType, r.route_name AS routeName, r.start_place_code AS startPlaceCode, sp.place_name AS startPlaceName, r.end_place_code AS endPlaceCode, ep.place_name AS endPlaceName, t.depart_time AS departTime, b.block_start_date AS blockStartDate, b.block_end_date AS blockEndDate, b.reason AS reason, b.active_yn AS activeYn, b.created_by_admin AS createdByAdmin FROM tbl_shuttle_block b JOIN tbl_shuttle_route r ON r.route_id = b.fk_route_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = b.fk_hotel_id JOIN tbl_shuttle_place sp ON sp.place_code = r.start_place_code JOIN tbl_shuttle_place ep ON ep.place_code = r.end_place_code LEFT JOIN tbl_shuttle_timetable t ON t.timetable_id = b.fk_timetable_id WHERE b.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND b.active_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.block_start_date DESC, b.shuttle_block_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_shuttle_route ( route_id, fk_hotel_id, route_type, start_place_code, end_place_code, route_name, active_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_tbl_shuttle_route.NEXTVAL, #{hotelId}, #{routeType}, #{startPlaceCode}, #{endPlaceCode}, #{routeName}, 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO tbl_shuttle_block ( shuttle_block_id, fk_hotel_id, fk_route_id, fk_timetable_id, block_start_date, block_end_date, reason, active_yn, created_by_admin, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_tbl_shuttle_block.NEXTVAL, #{hotelId}, #{routeId}, #{timetableId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reason}, 'Y', #{adminNo}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

MERGE INTO tbl_shuttle_slot_stock s USING ( SELECT seq_tbl_shuttle_slot_stock.NEXTVAL AS stock_id, t.timetable_id AS fk_timetable_id, d.ride_date AS ride_date, t.capacity AS capacity FROM tbl_shuttle_timetable t JOIN tbl_shuttle_route r ON r.route_id = t.fk_route_id CROSS JOIN ( SELECT #{startDate} + LEVEL - 1 AS ride_date FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (#{endDate} - #{startDate}) + 1 ) d WHERE r.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.active_yn = 'Y' AND t.active_yn = 'Y' ) src ON ( s.fk_timetable_id = src.fk_timetable_id AND s.ride_date = src.ride_date ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( stock_id, fk_timetable_id, ride_date, capacity, booked_qty, updated_at ) VALUES ( src.stock_id, src.fk_timetable_id, src.ride_date, src.capacity, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP )
